columns.extraction_plan: For the Abiraterone trial (Standard of care plus abiraterone, n=501), Gleason score ≤ 7 is 115 (23%). For the Abiraterone and enzalutamide trial (Standard of care plus enzalutamide and abiraterone, n=462), Gleason score ≤ 7 is 79 (17%).
For the Abiraterone trial (Standard of care, n=502), Gleason score ≤ 7 is 118 (24%). For the Abiraterone and enzalutamide trial (Standard of care, n=454), Gleason score ≤ 7 is 92 (20%).

For the Abiraterone trial (Standard of care plus abiraterone, n=501), Gleason score ≥ 8 is 366 (73%) (sum of 8, 9, 10). For the Abiraterone and enzalutamide trial (Standard of care plus enzalutamide and abiraterone, n=462), Gleason score ≥ 8 is 369 (80%) (sum of 8, 9, 10).

For the Abiraterone trial (Standard of care, n=502), Gleason score ≥ 8 is 374 (75%) (sum of 8, 9, 10). For the Abiraterone and enzalutamide trial (Standard of care, n=454), Gleason score ≥ 8 is 345 (76%) (sum of 8, 9, 10).
